form.formComment: Mare returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign won by 2 len this track January 2 over 900m defeating Miss Forte with 54kg at $1.90. form.formComment: Mare back from a spell of six months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign second of 12 at this track October 17 over 900m, 1.5 len behind Loughnashade with 51kg at $5.10. When resuming last campaign second last of 9 at Mizusawa March 11 2024 over 1600m, 13 len behind A Shin Porosir with 54kg at $62.90. Looks a key runner.
